name: High Fiber Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine oat bran, rolled oats, Fiber One cereal, bran flakes, raisins, and walnuts. Mix lightly and set aside.
2. In a separate mixing bowl, cream together the sugars and margarine until light and fluffy. Add egg whites and vanilla, mixing gently after each addition, scraping the bowl to ensure even distribution.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the flour mixture (all-purpose flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt) for about 1/2 minute.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture and water to the sugar mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in the bran mixture until well blended.
6. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of dough onto a cookie sheet sprayed with cooking spray or lined with aluminum foil.
7. Bake at 375°F for 12-14 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack for 1 minute before transferring to cool completely at room temperature.
